about: Suggest an improvement or new feature

labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?
<!--
Describe the use case. "I want to track X but currently I have to do Y" is
much more useful than "please add Z" — it leaves room to think about the
right shape of the solution.
-->

## Proposed solution (optional)
<!-- If you have an idea for how it could work, share it here. -->

## Alternatives you've considered
<!-- e.g. "I tried doing this with the JSON export but..." -->

## Additional context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other apps, etc. -->
